items.title: Discord Quietly Files For US IPO Tapping Goldman Sachs And JPMorgan: Report
items.description: Discord has filed confidentially for a U.S. IPO with Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan as underwriters, though the company may still decide not to go public, amid a rebounding U.S. tech IPO market in 2025.

items.title: Cramer warns the January rally is driven by emotion and not all stocks will hold up
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer says early January trading is being driven by emotion, momentum chasing and turnaround bets and urges investors not to get greedy.

items.title: JPMorgan: My Top Pick In The Financial Sector Before Q4 Earnings
items.description: JPMorgan (JPM) stays a top financial sector buy for 2026 as credit metrics stabilize.

items.title: Wealthfront’s IPO Was Lackluster. Goldman Sachs Is Still Skeptical.
items.description: Shares of the robo-advisor’s stock are trading below their offering price. The investment bank sees a risk from falling interest rates.

items.title: Why the Dow Is Beating the S&P and Nasdaq So Far This Year
items.description: The Dow has an early lead so far this year. The blue-chip index rose another 330 points, or 0.7%, in Tuesday morning trading. It already closed at a record on Monday, so any move higher will be a fresh milestone.
